recommendations.title: Research Depth
recommendations.action: Apply to a wet-lab research assistantship to increase academic rigor.

recommendations.title: Clinical Hours
recommendations.action: Increase clinical exposure via EMT certification or scribing.

recommendations.title: Community Service
recommendations.action: Volunteer 50+ hours in an underserved health clinic.

recommendations.title: Analytical Writing
recommendations.action: Submit a paper to a law-related undergraduate journal.

recommendations.title: Advocacy
recommendations.action: Join a mock trial or debate team to build public speaking grit.

recommendations.title: Legal Internship
recommendations.action: Seek a summer internship at a local law firm or courthouse.

recommendations.title: Technical Rigor
recommendations.action: Add relevant coursework or certifications (e.g. AWS, algorithms) to strengthen academic signal.

recommendations.title: Project Velocity
recommendations.action: Ship a side project or contribute to open source; aim for 3+ commits per week.

recommendations.title: Stack Depth
recommendations.action: Name concrete tools and languages (Python, SQL, React, etc.) and at least one deployed or portfolio project.

recommendations.title: Research Signal
recommendations.action: List lab work, methods, or publications to demonstrate scientific inquiry.

recommendations.title: Quantifiable Impact
recommendations.action: Add numbers: hours per week, sample size, outcomes, or grant amounts.

recommendations.title: Research Longevity
recommendations.action: Show sustained research (e.g. 2+ years in one lab) with clear date ranges.

recommendations.title: Academic Consistency
recommendations.action: Highlight honors, relevant coursework, or certifications (e.g. CFA, Excel).

recommendations.title: Leadership Density
recommendations.action: Name specific roles (President, Director, Lead) and outcomes with percentages or dollar impact.

recommendations.title: Analytics Proof
recommendations.action: Mention tools (Excel, Tableau) and quantifiable results (revenue, conversion, growth).

recommendations.title: Quant and Certifications
recommendations.action: Highlight CFA/CPA progress, Excel and modeling coursework, and finance/accounting rigor.

recommendations.title: Quantifiable Impact
recommendations.action: Add $ or % to every relevant bullet; name deal, audit, or transaction scope.

recommendations.title: Audit/Advisory Proof
recommendations.action: List audit, tax, or advisory internships with deliverables; add valuation or modeling exposure.

recommendations.title: Analytical Rigor
recommendations.action: Highlight strategy, econ, or analytics coursework and structured problem-solving.

recommendations.title: Client Impact
recommendations.action: Add $ or % outcomes and name deliverables (e.g. recommendation, framework).

recommendations.title: Consulting Proof
recommendations.action: List consulting internships, case competitions, or client projects with clear outcomes.

recommendations.title: Relevant Coursework
recommendations.action: List writing, media, or PR courses to strengthen academic signal.

recommendations.title: Portfolio Impact
recommendations.action: Add reach, engagement, or campaign outcomes with numbers.

recommendations.title: Content and Campaigns
recommendations.action: Name specific campaigns, channels, or content types and their impact.

recommendations.title: Certifications
recommendations.action: Add teaching or subject-area certifications and date earned.

recommendations.title: Teaching Experience
recommendations.action: List tutoring, mentoring, or classroom roles with clear date ranges and outcomes.

recommendations.title: Student Impact
recommendations.action: Quantify impact (students served, hours, grade improvement) where possible.

recommendations.title: Academic Rigor
recommendations.action: List relevant coursework, awards, or honors to strengthen academic signal.

recommendations.title: Portfolio and Productions
recommendations.action: Add links or descriptions of exhibitions, performances, reels, or design projects.

recommendations.title: Concrete Work
recommendations.action: Name specific projects, roles, and outcomes (audience reach, awards, collaborations).

recommendations.title: Research and Writing
recommendations.action: Highlight publications, theses, or conference presentations.

recommendations.title: Quantifiable Impact
recommendations.action: Add numbers where possible: readers served, events organized, hours taught.

recommendations.title: Evidence of Analysis
recommendations.action: Cite specific writing, research, or teaching outcomes with clear dates.
